stories.title: Bergs Wins Eastbourne — First ATP Title, First Belgian on Grass + CORRECTION to June 28 Pipeline

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Zizou Bergs wins the Eastbourne title.

3-6, 6-1, 6-4 over Humbert in the rain-delayed final. Down a set. Came back. First ATP title. First Belgian to win on grass.

He arrives at Wimbledon as a champion. 🎾 #ATPTour [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Zizou Bergs lost the first set in Eastbourne — then won 6-1, 6-4.

He came in on a 6-match losing streak. He leaves with his first ATP title.

Now he faces Humbert again at Wimbledon on Tuesday. #ATPTour [URL]

article.headline: Zizou Bergs Wins Eastbourne in Rain-Delayed Final, Claims First ATP Title and Belgian Grass History

stories.title: Raducanu Withdraws from Wimbledon with Stress Fracture

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Emma Raducanu withdraws from Wimbledon.

A scan Sunday night revealed a stress fracture in her lower right leg. She was due on court today vs Ruzic.

Her replacement: Darja Semenistaja, called up as lucky loser. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
18 players have now withdrawn from Wimbledon 2026 — Alcaraz (wrist), Raducanu (stress fracture), and 16 others.

Raducanu reached the Queen's final just two weeks ago. She's now watching from the sidelines. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Raducanu Withdraws from Wimbledon with Stress Fracture, Lucky Loser Called Up Hours Before Match

stories.title: Wimbledon 2026 Opens — Early Results and Centre Court Schedule

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon Day 1 is underway.

Early results from the outside courts:
• Bencic def. Stojsavljevic 6-2, 6-1
• Fucsovics def. Van Assche 6-3, 4-0 ret.

Sinner, Sabalenka and Djokovic are next on Centre Court. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Centre Court is running at Wimbledon.

Sinner opens vs Kecmanovic. Sabalenka follows. Then Djokovic.

Three of the biggest names in tennis. One afternoon. All on grass for the first time. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Wimbledon 2026 Opens: Sinner, Sabalenka and Djokovic Headline a Blockbuster Centre Court Day

stories.title: Bergs and Humbert — Wimbledon Rematch After Eastbourne Final

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Bergs beat Humbert in Eastbourne Sunday.

They play each other again at Wimbledon on Tuesday.

Three days. Two matches. Same two players on grass. That almost never happens. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Bergs vs Humbert at Wimbledon: A Rematch Three Days in the Making After Eastbourne

stories.title: Serena Williams at Wimbledon — The Return Begins Tuesday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Serena Williams plays her first Grand Slam singles match since the 2022 US Open.

She's 44. Her opponent Tuesday is 20-year-old Maya Joint.

Seven Wimbledon titles. First singles match here since 2022. #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Serena Williams Returns to Wimbledon at 44 — First Grand Slam Singles Match Since the 2022 US Open
